subject: fix(cron): restore original migration, add removal migration
body:
Restores 20260226000004_cron_jobs.sql and adds a proper removal
migration (20260307000001) instead of deleting the original. The
original may already be applied to the live database, so deleting
it would leave orphaned pg_cron objects with no migration trail.

Tags: backend, cron, migrations
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: deployment
Semver: patch

title: restore original migration, add removal migration
